summary: Annual average CPI-U YoY for 2022 estimated at median ~6.7%, with P10=4.8%, P90=8.8%
content: Key findings: Dec 2021 CPI-U at 280.806, Nov 2021 YoY was 6.87%, Dec 2021 YoY was 7.16%. Q4 2021 MoM average was 0.83%. Mechanical floor (zero further inflation) is 3.63%. Even 0.2% MoM (normal) yields ~5% annual avg. Monte Carlo with mixture of 3 regimes (rapid deceleration 25%, moderate persistence 45%, acceleration 30%) gives median ~6.8%, mean ~6.9%. Consensus in Dec 2021 was much lower (~3.5-5% CPI) but had been systematically underforecasting.
